experience.title: Uber - M3 Metrics
description: Software engineering intern on the M3 Metrics team (Platform Engineering).

Implemented a high-cardinality detection mechanism in the Go-based M3 distributed query system using Thrift, enabling automated backoff for expensive queries across company-wide production metrics workloads.
Designed and built a production cost accounting framework for M3 queries with primary and secondary attribution, increasing query cost coverage from 75% to 93% across company-wide metrics workloads.

experience.title: Uber - UberSTAR

images.description: Entrance of San Francisco's Uber office
Picture with my Mentor, Mingjie Wang.

description: Software engineering intern at the Biztech team (Platform Engineering).
Developed a GenAI Application Evaluation framework for internal tools using Michelangelo, Langchain, gRPC, Java, and internal tooling.
Implemented robust methodology by analyzing over 7 papers in the field. Benchmarked individual module performance using field-related datasets.
Refactored framework module, reducing Hive query latency by 70%.
Implemented CLI tools for module testing, benchmarking, dataset generation, and result visualization.

experience.title: On Campus Intern
description: Developed a crowd-counting project to optimize public space usage by analyzing the use of ITESM's Central Park.
Implemented person re-identification (ReID) using clustering, torchreid, YOLO, and Docker environments.
Developed a video upload dashboard using Next.js, integrated with S3, and deployed via AWS Amplify.

experience.title: Dataexpress
description: Developed the frontend and backend of a No-Code Data Pipeline ELT Platform using Next.js, Node.js, and Python.
Created a destination connector for Google Cloud Storage, including validation, IAM permission testing, and feature documentation.
Built source connectors for Facebook Ads and Facebook Pages using the Marketing API.

experience.title: RoBorregos

images.description: On our trip to compete at RescueMaze in Xalapa.

description: Representative Robotics Team from Tecnológico de Monterrey, Campus Monterrey.
Participated in national robotics competitions (Robocup Maze, Robocup@Home), representing ITESM.
Integrated locally run STT (Whisper) and VAD (Silero VAD) ML models into a speech-to-text pipeline (ROS, Python) for an xArm 6 robot, enabling voice command execution on a Jetson Xavier.
Led Human-Robot Interaction (HRI) development for RoboCup@Home and mentored the RCJ Maze team.

experience.title: Virtual Learning Center
description: Virtual Learning Center (CVA) is a social program that promotes access to quality education through a virtual learning community offering training via courses and free educational resources.
Built a course on the American healthcare system, designed to help immigrants leverage the existing programs and resources available to them.
Designed and implemented over 60 responsive pages of content, and 4 activities using Bootstrap and JavaScript.

Implemented utility scripts to automate common tasks (i.e, compress images and eliminate dependencies efficiently). Shared the scripts to other programmers creating courses for the organization, to streamline production.

experience.title: MAE (Academic mentor of excellence)
description: MAE is an organization that provides academic support to college students in a variety of subjects.
Providing academic mentoring to students in mathematics, computer science, and physics courses.
Aided in the MAE webpage redesign to enhance user experience and streamline scheduling for students.
